items.title: London Marathon
items.summary: Gabby Logan has the best of the day’s action from the London Marathon.
items.whyItMatters: Running and athletics widen the page beyond match coverage into performance and training stories.

items.title: Gloucs remain in control against Derbyshire
items.summary: Gloucestershire give themselves a good chance of a first victory of the season as they stay on top against Derbyshire.
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: IPL 2026: Mohsin's fifer helps LSG restrict KKR to 155/7 despite Rinku's 83
items.summary: Mohsin’s 5 for 23, a personal best for the left-arm pacer in this format, tore apart an already struggling KKR batting unit, as he snaffled the cream wickets of Ajinkya Rahane,...
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
